underpass_echo_greet.speaker: Stranger
underpass_echo_greet.text:
From the shadows of the underpass, a familiar voice:
"雨这么大，你不会想走太远的。"

echo_recognize.speaker: Stranger
echo_recognize.text:
They step into the faint light. The same coat. The same tired smile.
"I told you. Everyone walks this route."
They lean against the wall, watching you.

choices.text: 「承认吧，我不知道自己在做什么。」

echo_hope.speaker: Stranger
echo_hope.text:
"I know." They say it softly. Almost kindly.
"I know you're fine. That's what worries me."
They push off the wall. "The ones who say they're fine are the ones I remember."

echo_hope_question.speaker: Stranger
echo_hope_question.text:
"It means you're still fighting. You haven't given up yet."
They smile — a real one this time.
"The subway station's up ahead. You'll know what to do when you get there."

echo_despair.speaker: Stranger
echo_despair.text:
They don't respond at first. Just watch you with an expression
that's hard to read. Then:
"Neither do I. Nobody does. But we keep walking."

echo_despair_question.speaker: Stranger
echo_despair_question.text:
"Because stopping is the only real failure."
They gesture down the tunnel.
"The station's not far. You'll make it."

echo_acknowledge.speaker: Stranger
echo_acknowledge.text:
"Did I? That was a long time ago. Or maybe just last night.
Time moves strange in this city."
They look at you. "You've been through a lot since then."

echo_deflect.speaker: Stranger
echo_deflect.text:
"Harsh. But fair."
They raise their hands in mock surrender.
"I'll leave you alone. Just remember — the rain always stops.
Eventually."

echo_silent.speaker: Narrator
echo_silent.text:
You walk past without a word.
Their voice follows you: "雨这么大……"
The words echo off the tunnel walls.
You've heard them before. You'll hear them again.

echo_farewell.speaker: Stranger
echo_farewell.text:
"The station's just ahead. One more walk."
They fade into the shadows of the underpass.
Or maybe they were never really there.
The exit glows faintly in the distance.
